site.name: YipConsult
site.tagline: AI 自動化，從此不再是大企業專利
site.description: YipConsult is a Hong Kong-based full-stack development team specializing in AI automation for SMEs. We build websites, AI agents, and automation tools that help small businesses work smarter.

hero.headline: AI 自動化，從此不再是大企業專利
hero.subheadline: We're a Hong Kong full-stack team that builds websites, AI agents, and automation tools — designed specifically for SMEs with limited resources and big ambitions.

services.heading: What We Build
services.subheading: 務實落地、結果導向 — practical solutions, measurable results.

items.title: Web & App Development
items.description: Custom websites and web applications built with modern frameworks. Fast, responsive, and designed to convert visitors into customers — from corporate landing pages to full-scale SaaS platforms.

items.title: AI Agent Development
items.description: Custom AI agents and automation workflows that handle repetitive tasks — customer inquiries, lead qualification, data entry, content generation — so your team can focus on growth.
benefits: AI content generation for social media

items.title: Translation & Localization
items.description: Professional translation and localization services bridging English, Cantonese, and Mandarin. We don't just translate words — we adapt content to resonate with your target audience.

projects.heading: Our Projects
projects.subheading: 由小做起、逐步擴展 — start small, scale fast. Here's what we're building.

items.name: KidWealth AI
items.description: Bilingual financial literacy for Hong Kong kids aged 6–14. Interactive money lessons, life skills, and entrepreneurship stories via WhatsApp/Telegram.

items.name: HK Driving Exam App
items.description: A comprehensive practice app for Hong Kong driving license examinations. Includes mock tests, road sign quizzes, and AI-powered mistake analysis.

items.name: CantoQuest
items.description: An interactive Cantonese learning app designed for Mandarin speakers relocating to Hong Kong. Focuses on practical daily conversations with AI-powered pronunciation feedback.

items.name: ReelForge
items.description: AI-powered reel generation SaaS for Hong Kong property agencies. Automatically transforms property listings into engaging short-form video content for social media marketing.

about.heading: About Us
about.english: We're a full-stack development team based in Hong Kong, focused on bringing AI automation to SMEs. We believe automation isn't just for big corporations — it's a practical tool every small business can deploy today to save time, cut costs, and unlock growth.

cantonese.intro: 我地係專注中小企 AI 自動化轉型嘅 Full-Stack Web Development Team。
cantonese.mission: 我地深信 AI 自動化唔再係大企業嘅專利，而係每間資源有限、人手精簡嘅中小企都可以即時用到嘅效率工具。我嘅使命係幫你將日常瑣碎工序交畀機器，把寶貴時間留畀真正嘅業務增長同創新。

style.heading: 我地既工作風格：
points: 務實落地、結果導向：唔好堆砌高大上技術，只選最合適、最穩定、最快見效嘅方案，確保每一個項目都帶來可量度嘅成本節省同效率提升。
由小做起、逐步擴展：明白中小企最怕大工程，所以永遠從單一痛點入手，快速產生價值，再慢慢擴展成全方位自動化。
以人為本（Human-in-the-loop）：AI 負責處理 80% 重複性、標準化工作，而複雜判斷、情感溝通同策略決策，永遠由人類團隊把關，讓員工潛力真正被釋放。
透明協作、易上手：全程用最簡單易明嘅方式解釋技術，讓非技術背景嘅老闆同團隊都可以輕鬆掌握同管理。

process.heading: 如何處理每一個 AI 自動化項目：
steps: 找出痛點：同你深入檢視公司日常運作，一起鎖定最耗時、最枯燥嘅工序（例如客戶查詢、報價、數據錄入、社群管理）。
由小做起：優先推出簡單但強大嘅解決方案，例如 24/7 智能聊天機械人（WhatsApp / Messenger / 網站整合）、報價單與發票自動化、OCR 數據自動錄入、或 AI 社群內容生成工具，讓你即時感受到效益。
全面整合 + 持續優化：逐步連接不同平台同工具，建立完整 AI 工作流（包括個人化電郵行銷、庫存智能預測、市場分析），同時提供培訓同 handover，確保系統長期穩定運行。
增值轉化：除咗幫你自動化現有流程，我仲會協助你將呢啲解決方案包裝成可銷售產品或模板，例如兒童教育 AI 互動學習工具、Reels 自動生成 SaaS 等，幫你開拓全新 side income 來源。

cantonese.tech: 我地團隊擅長用 Next.js、OpenAI / Grok API、Supabase、WhatsApp Business API等現代技術，快速開發低成本、高性價比嘅 AI 解決方案。無論係智能客服、行政流程自動化，定係行銷內容放大，我地都以「釋放員工潛力、提升業務競爭力」為最終目標。
cantonese.cta: 準備好讓你嘅業務進入「自動駕駛」模式，一起以更精簡成本發揮更大成果嗎？歡迎聯絡我地，一齊度身打造專屬你公司嘅 AI 自動化方案！

contact.heading: Let's Talk
contact.subheading: 準備好讓你嘅業務進入「自動駕駛」模式？

footer.tagline: Full-stack AI automation for Hong Kong SMEs.
